description.value: Where other casters must spend supporting energy to extend their effects, your patron sustains what they have blessed. A weave offered as a prayer lingers far longer than its energy alone would suggest.

system.benefits: When you cast a weave using your patron's Primary energy that has a duration, extend the duration by one step on the duration table at no additional Energy cost. This cannot extend a duration beyond 1 hour.

usage.text: Passive; applies to patron primary energy weaves with duration only
